notes: v1.3.61: Video attach + preview + sampling controls end-to-end for Qwen 3.6 (and any VL model). File picker + drag-drop accept video/mp4, video/webm, video/quicktime up to 100 MB. Message bubbles render <video controls>. Session settings expose Video FPS + Max Frames sliders (defaults 2 fps / 8 frames). Engine side (OpenCV frame sampling → Qwen 3.6 native temporal embedding) unchanged from v1.3.59 — this is purely the UI → IPC → API wiring that was missing. Also ships v1.3.60 (Gemma 3n + no-PLE Gemma 4 JANG load fix, vmlx#87). DMG includes both vMLX.app (Python stable) and vMLX v2 (beta).app (Swift preview).
